title: Software Update - DFU - Back buttons
scenario: Back button during DFU flow returns user to appropriate previous screen in Device Settings on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Pair the headset and launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to Device Settings → Software Update.
4. Press the back button (upper left corner).
5. Tap Update again, then tap Continue.
6. Press the back button (upper left corner).
expected: Step 4: User returns to the Device Settings screen with the Software Update tab expanded. Step 6: User returns to the first DFU screen (Software Update screen).
